      "content": "# Apollo 17 Flown Hasselblad Double Chart Map. Apollo 17 mission flown and used photography map from the collection of Commander Gene Cernan. This double Apollo 17 flown photography map came from the collection of Mission Commander Gene Cernan. This map was flown to the moon aboard Command Module *America* during Apollo 17 in December 1972 and was used by the crew to guide their efforts in photographing areas of the lunar surface for scientific study. The double map features the sextant photography shutter speed chart, detailing the Hasselblad camera lens configuration. * Double map chart flown to the moon aboard Apollo 17.
